name: Basavaraja S G
objective: Frontend and Mobile Developer with 3 years of experience building production-grade web and mobile applications using React.js and React Native. Experienced in designing scalable frontend architectures, offline-first mobile applications, real-time systems using WebSockets, and analytics-driven product improvements. Delivered cross-platform applications deployed to both Play Store and App Store with strong focus on performance, reliability, and user experience.

skills.items: Cross-platform mobile apps, Push Notifications, Offline-first architecture, SQLite storage
REST APIs (100+ endpoints), WebSockets, Firebase (Auth, Cloud Messaging, Analytics), Google Maps SDK, Razorpay Payment Gateway
AWS S3, AWS CloudFront, AWS API Gateway, Firebase, BigQuery, Looker Studio
Android Studio, Xcode, Expo, React Navigation
Git, GitHub, Postman, npm, SQLite, EmailJS, Looker Studio, Trello

experience.description: Building scalable web and mobile applications using React.js and React Native with focus on performance optimization, offline-first architecture, and real-time communication systems.
highlights: Delivered 5+ cross-platform mobile applications for Android and iOS using React Native, successfully deployed to both Google Play Store and Apple App Store.
Enabled seamless application usage in low-connectivity environments by implementing offline-first architecture using SQLite-based local storage and asset caching.
Enabled data-driven product decisions by integrating Firebase Analytics with BigQuery to track user engagement and campaign performance.
Connected frontend applications to backend systems by integrating 100+ REST API endpoints supporting authentication, analytics, and content management.
Engineered real-time healthcare queue management system using WebSockets enabling live queue visibility across TV displays and mobile devices.
Improved medication adherence features by developing SQLite-based notification scheduling and background reminders for healthcare applications.
Enabled secure online consultation payments by integrating Razorpay payment gateway into healthcare mobile platforms.
Improved application stability and compatibility by migrating legacy React Native applications to newer versions and resolving platform issues.
Built marketing analytics web application calculating ROAS, CPM, CTR, impressions, conversions, and revenue metrics for campaign performance analysis.
Improved application performance by ~30% through caching and optimized component rendering.
Managed production builds, release pipelines, and deployments for mobile applications on both Play Store and App Store.
Integrated Google Maps SDK to enable location-based features including clinic discovery and navigation within healthcare applications.
Designed and implemented responsive UI components from Figma designs ensuring consistent user experience across mobile and web platforms.

education.institution: BLDEA’s VP Dr PG Halakatti College of Engineering & Technology
